data.name: Elf Adventure: The Lost Castle
data.detailed_description:
Game Description:


The elf Freilina was patrolling long-abandoned territories of the forces of evil when she noticed a mysterious castle with lights glowing in its windows. Who could have taken residence in this cursed place? Bandits? Demons? Or something far worse? Armed with a sword and a bow, she ventures inside to uncover the truth and cleanse the castle of its monstrous inhabitants.



Elf Adventure: The Lost Castle is an atmospheric anime-style adventure where players explore a dark and mysterious castle filled with traps, enemies, and valuable treasures. Navigate through vast halls and eerie corridors, battle goblins and their leaders, and discover hidden treasure chests containing unique illustrations of Freilina.

Game Features:


  • Choose your combat style – Use a bow for ranged attacks or a sword for close combat.

  • Explore the castle – Long corridors, hidden rooms, deadly traps.

  • Battle goblins – Defeat enemies and face off against their leaders.

  • Collect treasure chests – Find valuable rewards and gather all of Freilina's illustrations.

  • Deep atmosphere – A dark fantasy setting full of mysteries and dangers.



Are you ready to cleanse the castle of evil and uncover its secrets?

data.short_description: Elf Adventure: The Lost Castle is a dark anime-style adventure where you explore a mysterious castle, fight goblins and their leaders, avoid traps, and discover hidden chests with unique illustrations of Freilina.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
